name: Input-Lag Forklift
description: Dock both freight crates while every directional input executes exactly one command late.
natural_language: Dock both crates. Every direction executes the previous direction; use EXECUTE QUEUE to run the last one.

metadata.notes: A deterministic one-cycle control delay wraps twelve independently solved two-crate Sokoban topologies, four spatial transforms, real collision/push state, and visible input/execution telemetry.
